title: Lastrea lugubris

taxonomy: Lastrea lugubris is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The species is further categorized as a member of the subfamily Dryopteridoideae. The classification of Lastrea lugubris is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and venation pattern. This fern is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries like Malaysia and Indonesia.
